items.title: Global Checkout Conversion Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve checkout completion, local method relevance, and payment approval performance for scaled merchants.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase captured payments from existing checkout demand.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve retained merchant volume through conversion quality.

productBricks.change: Improve hosted checkout flows by market and device.
Improve method ordering and country-level relevance.
Improve approval recovery on legitimate traffic.

deliveryChannels.change: Expose supporting orchestration and authorization updates.

items.title: Recurring Revenue Recovery Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve recurring collections, failed-payment recovery, and pricing-model operability.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce time needed to ship billing changes.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase product depth in recurring-revenue accounts.

productBricks.change: Improve pricing and lifecycle configuration workflows.
Improve usage rating visibility and controls.
Improve retries, reminders, and collections behavior.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated metering and billing APIs.

items.title: Connect Activation and Payout Reliability Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve connected-account activation, remediation clarity, and payout reliability for platform operators.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the share of qualified counterparties that activate successfully.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Support volume growth through lower activation and payout friction.

productBricks.change: Improve payout scheduling and failure handling.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated onboarding and payout services.

items.title: Finance Trust and Tax Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve tax readiness, reporting trust, and reconciliation clarity for recurring and finance-sensitive customers.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce launch blockers in global monetization.
Improve confidence in month-end and board reporting.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase trust-driven adoption of finance automation products.

productBricks.change: Improve obligation monitoring and registration support.
Improve recognition outputs and accounting visibility.
Improve investigation workflows for financial exceptions.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated tax and reporting workflows.
Release updated exports and event data.
